title: ProgressEvent
description: Represents the current status of a resource operation request.

Identifier.description: The primary identifier for the resource.

RequestToken.description: The unique token representing this resource operation request. Use this token with GetResourceRequestStatus to check operation progress.

HooksRequestToken.description: The unique token for hooks processing.

OperationStatus.description: The current status of the resource operation request.

EventTime.description: When the resource operation request was initiated (Unix timestamp).

ResourceModel.description: A JSON string representing the resource model.

StatusMessage.description: A message explaining the current status.

ErrorCode.description: The error code if the operation failed.

RetryAfter.description: When to retry the operation (Unix timestamp).
